metadata.description: GRAPH — a design pattern for agentic architectures (Grounded, Reviewable, Agnostic, Persistent, Hierarchical), installable as a Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: graph-init
plugins.description: GRAPH pattern bootstrapper: versioned hierarchical knowledge graph with human-review gates, autonomous-loop circuit breakers, and a built-in stack-agnostic code indexer. Greenfield or brownfield, any language.
